ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cars" (
  "car_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each car */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the car model */,
  "miles_per_gallon" REAL /* Miles per gallon */,
  "cylinders" INTEGER /* Number of cylinders */,
  "displacement" REAL /* Displacement in cubic inches */,
  "horsepower" INTEGER /* Horsepower */,
  "weight_in_lbs" REAL /* Weight in pounds */,
  "acceleration" REAL /* Acceleration in seconds */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the car */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Origin of the car (e.g., USA, Europe, Japan) */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manufacturer */,
  "car_model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car model */,
  "vin" TEXT /* Vehicle Identification Number */,
  "transmission" TEXT /* Type of transmission (e.g., automatic, manual) */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel (e.g., gasoline, diesel) */,
  "drive_type" TEXT /* Type of drive (e.g., front-wheel, rear-wheel, all-wheel) */,
  "body_style" TEXT /* Style of the car body (e.g., sedan, SUV) */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the car */,
  "interior_color" TEXT /* Color of the car's interior */,
  "mileage" REAL /* Current mileage of the car */,
  "service_history" TEXT /* History of service and maintenance */,
  "warranty_expiration" TEXT /* Date when the warranty expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("car_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cars_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cars_car_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_model_id") REFERENCES car_models ("car_model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the manufacturer's website */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the manufacturer was founded */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the headquarters */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "car_models" (
  "car_model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each car model */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the car model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the car model */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manufacturer */,
  "production_start_year" INTEGER /* Year the model started production */,
  "production_end_year" INTEGER /* Year the model ended production */,
  "body_styles" TEXT /* List of available body styles for the model */,
  "engine_types" TEXT /* List of available engine types for the model */,
  "transmission_types" TEXT /* List of available transmission types for the model */,
  "fuel_types" TEXT /* List of available fuel types for the model */,
  "drive_types" TEXT /* List of available drive types for the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("car_model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_car_models_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "car_sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car being sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the car */,
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the buyer */,
  "sale_location" TEXT /* Location where the sale took place */,
  "sales_person_id" INTEGER /* ID of the salesperson who made the sale */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Invoice number for the sale */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., cash, credit card) */,
  "is_leased" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the car is leased */,
  "lease_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the lease (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_car_sales_buyer_id FOREIGN KEY ("buyer_id") REFERENCES buyers ("buyer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_car_sales_car_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "buyers" (
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each buyer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the buyer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the buyer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the buyer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the buyer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the buyer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the buyer */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the buyer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the buyer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the buyer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("buyer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ownerships" (
  "ownership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ownership */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the ownership */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the ownership */,
  "mileage_at_start" REAL /* Mileage of the car at the start of ownership */,
  "mileage_at_end" REAL /* Mileage of the car at the end of ownership */,
  "reason_for_sale" TEXT /* Reason for selling the car */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ownership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ownerships_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ownerships_car_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the owner */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the owner */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the owner */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the owner */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the owner */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the owner */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the owner */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the owner */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., sales, engineer, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the car */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the car was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session (in seconds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_car_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "car_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "feature_value" TEXT /* Value of the feature */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manufacturer */,
  "model_year" INTEGER /* Year of the car model */,
  "is_standard" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the feature is standard or optional */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_car_features_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_car_features_car_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "car_options" (
  "option_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each option */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car */,
  "option_name" TEXT /* Name of the option */,
  "option_value" TEXT /* Value of the option */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manufacturer */,
  "model_year" INTEGER /* Year of the car model */,
  "is_standard" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the option is standard or optional */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("option_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_car_options_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_car_options_car_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers_representatives" (
  "representative_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each representative */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manufacturer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the representative */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the representative */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the representative */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the representative (e.g., sales manager, regional manager) */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Location of the office */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("representative_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_manufacturers_representatives_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers_dealers" (
  "dealer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dealer */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manufacturer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dealer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the dealer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the dealer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the dealer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the dealer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the dealer */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the dealer */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the dealer's manager */,
  "manager_email" TEXT /* Email of the dealer's manager */,
  "manager_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the dealer's manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dealer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_manufacturers_dealers_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id")
)
